parameters.content:
# Amazon Seller Intel — Telegram Bot

**Credentials required (match names exactly):**
- `Telegram Bot` → Telegram API
- `Apify API Key` → Header Auth: `Authorization: Bearer apify_api_xxx`
- `Google Drive` → Google Drive OAuth2
- `Google Sheets` → Google Sheets OAuth2

**No local server needed** — browse nodes fetched directly from Google Sheets.

**Commands:**
```
collect asins Baby Accessories ES
collect asins Women Swimwear UK
scrape sellers
status
help
```

**Flow:**
1. collect asins → Apify scrapes → notifies when done
2. scrape sellers → Apify scrapes → saves to Google Drive

**Google Drive folders created automatically:**
Main Category → Sub-Category → Seller Data Sheet

parameters.text:
🤖 *Amazon Seller Intel Bot*

Available commands:

📦 *Collect ASINs:*
`collect asins Baby Accessories ES`
`collect asins Women Swimwear UK`

🔎 *Scrape Seller Data:*
`scrape sellers`
_(Run after collecting ASINs)_

📊 *Check Status:*
`status`

_Marketplace codes: ES UK DE FR IT_

={{ '📊 *Session Status*

' + (Object.keys($('Parse Message').item.json.session).length > 0 ? '✅ ASINs stored: ' + ($('Parse Message').item.json.session.asinCount || 0) + '
Category: ' + ($('Parse Message').item.json.session.categoryQuery || 'N/A') + '
Marketplace: ' + ($('Parse Message').item.json.session.marketplace || 'N/A') + '

Send `scrape sellers` to continue.' : '⚠️ No session data. Send a collect command first.') }}
={{ '❌ No categories found for: *' + $json.query + '* on ' + $json.marketplace + '\n\nTry: Baby, Women, Men, Girls, Accessories, Swimwear, etc.' }}

={{ '🔄 Starting ASIN collection...

📂 Categories found: *' + $json.count + '*
🌍 Marketplace: *' + $json.marketplace + '*
🔍 Query: *' + $json.query + '*
📦 Limit: *' + ($json.maxItems === 0 ? 'Unlimited' : $json.maxItems + ' total') + '*

_This may take several minutes. I'll notify you when done._' }}

={{ '✅ *ASIN Collection Complete!*

📦 ASINs collected: *' + $('Store ASINs').item.json.asinCount + '*' + ($('Store ASINs').item.json.maxItems > 0 ? ' (limit: ' + $('Store ASINs').item.json.maxItems + ')' : ' (unlimited)') + '
🌍 Marketplace: *' + $('Store ASINs').item.json.marketplace + '*

*Preview:*
' + ($('Store ASINs').item.json.previewAsins || []).map(a => '• `' + a.asin + '` — ' + (a.category || 'N/A')).join('
') + '

➡️ Send `scrape sellers` to start scraping seller data.' }}

❌ No ASINs found in session.

Please collect ASINs first:
`collect asins Baby Accessories ES`

Then send `scrape sellers` again.

={{ '🔎 Starting seller data scraping...

📦 ASINs to process: *' + $json.asinCount + '*
🌍 Marketplace: *' + ($json.marketplace || 'ES') + '*
📂 Category: *' + ($json.categoryQuery || 'N/A') + '*

_This may take 10–30 minutes. I'll notify you when done._' }}

={{ '✅ *Seller Scraping Complete!*

📊 Sellers found: *' + $json.totalSellers + '*
🌍 Marketplace: *' + $json.marketplace + '*

📁 *Saved to Google Drive:*
📂 ' + $json.mainCategory + '
   📂 ' + $json.subCategory + '
      📊 Seller Data Sheet

🔗 [Open Spreadsheet](https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/' + $json.spreadsheetId + '/edit)' }}
